# Malera Studio

## About

Malera Studio is a small creative studio based in Pristina, Kosovo. We build digital products, brands, and experiences for clients in Kosovo, the Balkans, and worldwide. Our tagline is "We just build good stuff."

We combine modern web and mobile development with video production, brand identity design, and AI-powered automation. Every project is approached with a focus on clarity, performance, and long-term value.

## Founding Story

Malera Studio was founded in 2026 in Kosovo by a team of designers, developers, and makers who believe good work should speak for itself. The studio was started to bring world-class digital craft to local and regional businesses without the overhead and complexity of traditional agencies.

## Team Philosophy

We keep our team small and our standards high. We do not chase trends or add complexity for the sake of it. Our philosophy is simple: understand the problem, choose the right tools, and build something that works beautifully.

## Services

### 1. Web Development
Custom websites and web applications built with modern frameworks. Our work is fast, accessible, responsive, and SEO-optimized. We build landing pages, marketing sites, CMS-driven platforms, dashboards, and full-stack web applications.

### 2. Mobile Apps
Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android. We focus on seamless user experiences, clean interfaces, and reliable performance.

### 3. Video Production
Professional video production from concept to final cut. This includes brand films, commercials, promotional content, and social media videos.

### 4. AI Bots and Automation
Intelligent automation solutions and AI-powered chatbots that streamline business workflows. We build tools that save time, reduce manual work, and improve customer experiences.

### 5. Brand Identity
Complete brand identity design including logos, typography, color systems, brand guidelines, and visual direction.

## Portfolio

### NOVRIX.IO
- URL: https://novrix.io
- Category: On-Chain Intelligence
- Year: 2025
- Description: A crypto-native intelligence terminal that distills on-chain data into actionable signal. Features three core modules: Sentiment, Metrilytics, and Whale Tracking. Built with Next.js, Cloudflare, on-chain data, and real-time processing.

### RADIOFONTANA.ORG
- URL: https://radiofontana.org
- Category: Digital Radio and News
- Year: 2025
- Description: Albania's 98.8 FM, broadcasting live from Istog, Kosovo. A full-spectrum digital radio platform with 24/7 live streaming, real-time news, weather, curated highlights, and social integration. Built with streaming, web audio, Node.js, and Cloudflare.

### BARBERBROTHERS.STYLE
- URL: https://barberbrothers.style
- Category: Booking and Brand
- Year: 2025
- Description: A premium barbershop in Fushë Kosovë built around real online appointments. Four independent barbers run their own booking slots through a streamlined system. Bilingual Albanian-English. Built with Next.js, Stripe, a booking API, and a CMS.

## Tech Stack and Tools

We choose tools based on what each project actually needs. Our typical stack includes:

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend and APIs: Node.js, Cloudflare Workers, serverless platforms
- Mobile: React Native and native platforms when needed
- Infrastructure: Cloudflare Pages, Cloudflare Workers
- Design and Video: Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, motion tools
- AI and Automation: OpenAI APIs, custom bots, workflow automation

## Pricing

We work on fixed-price engagements with detailed scope documents upfront. Any changes beyond the original scope are discussed and quoted separately before work continues.

### Essential — €1,500
Best for a landing page or small site up to 5 pages. Includes responsive design, basic SEO, two revision rounds, and delivery within one week.

### Business — €4,500
Best for growing businesses that need up to 15 pages, a CMS, deeper SEO, motion and interaction, analytics, and three revision rounds.

### Build It Together — Custom Pricing
Best for platforms, SaaS products, full-stack applications, AI integrations, dashboards, and ongoing partnerships. Scope and pricing are defined together.

## Location and Contact

- Location: Pristina, Kosovo
- Email: hello@malera.studio
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/malera.studio
- Website: https://www.malera.studio

We work with clients locally in Kosovo, across the Balkans, and remotely worldwide.

## Values

- Clarity over complexity
- Performance over bloat
- Long-term partnerships over one-off transactions
- Good design is good business
- AI should amplify human work, not replace judgment

## Work Philosophy

Every engagement starts with a conversation. We define the problem, agree on scope, and build in focused iterations. We communicate openly, avoid surprises, and deliver work we are proud to stand behind.
